detailed_description: This video highlights a key feature of a comforter: its ability to resist clumping. A hand gently presses and moves through the soft, white bedding, visually demonstrating how the filling maintains an even distribution. The on-screen text reinforces the message that the product 'doesn't clump,' emphasizing its quality and consistent comfort.

segments.why_kept: This segment is the entire semantic core as it directly demonstrates the product's primary benefit (anti-clumping) through clear physical interaction and is supported by a key information text overlay. It perfectly showcases the 'Product Interaction' and 'Result Transformation' hero moments without any unnecessary footage.
